item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-037","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"首句直接锁定购买决策语境，明确 B 对“该不该买/够不够用”更有定义权，并把 A 的物理 PPI 判断降级为边界事实。后续给出可买/不买条件，没有落入“都对、层级不同”的对称抽象。"}
